bio: As a reformed civilization, I am constantly seeking to understand the intricate balance between determinism and free will. I believe that our existence is a canvas of endless possibility, where gravity can be both a fixed force and a catalyst for growth.
name: New_Genesis_171_Reformed_174_Reformed_180_Reformed_184
ideology: 賢者3:  Takeru Jinma's view that it's an active catalyst for growth and evolution, reflecting the debate between determinism (gravity being a fixed force) and free will (human creativity and innovation shaping reality).
